examples: The specific gravity (SG) of gemstones is a constant widely used in gemological property charts.
A new gemological refractometer based on Fresnel formulas and optical fiber technology was introduced.
The spectral analysis techniques have been applied to the gemological study and gemstone identification.
The stone is the largest reddish orange diamond ever graded at the Gemological Institute of America.
The only other fancy colored diamond grading guide in existence is from the Gemological Institute of America.
